description_long: This object is a set of five baseball bats, each with a unique and menacing modification. Three of the bats are wrapped with barbed wire and nails protruding from the barrel, giving them a dangerous, weaponized appearance. The other two bats are more traditional, but one features a large, double-bladed axe head attached to the barrel, while the other is covered in dense, spiked metal bristles. All bats have a wooden body with a natural finish, and the words 'GOOD NIGHT' are boldly printed in red along the barrel. The handles are painted with a blue, red, and white diamond pattern, and the lower portion is wrapped in a light-colored grip.
description: A set of five wooden baseball bats, each heavily modified with barbed wire, nails, spikes, or an axe head, and featuring 'GOOD NIGHT' text and colorful handle designs.
description_view_0: Front view showing all five bats, highlighting the 'GOOD NIGHT' text, barbed wire, nails, spikes, and the axe head attachment.
description_view_1: Side view focusing on the profile of a bat with barbed wire and nails, showing the protruding elements and the thickness of the modifications.
description_view_2: Rear view of the bats, displaying the back of the axe head, the spiked bat, and the reverse side of the 'GOOD NIGHT' text.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, emphasizing the barbed wire and nail modifications, as well as the colorful handle patterns.
attribute_grip_tape_pattern: The handle is painted with a blue, red, and white diamond pattern and wrapped in a light-colored grip, but there is no distinct grip tape or logo.
attribute_barrel_markings: The words 'GOOD NIGHT' are printed in bold red capital letters along the barrel of each bat.
attribute_end_cap_design: The end cap is rounded, matching the wood of the bat, with no distinct markings or logos.
